name: 13p12_alpha_satellite_SF3
description: Chr13 centromeric alpha-satellite higher-order repeat (HOR) array of the SF3 (suprachromosomal family 3) clade, shared with the centromere of chr21 (D13Z1/D21Z1). The HOR is dimeric to multimeric (~1.7 kb monomer), spanning several Mb. Surrounding the HOR are divergent monomeric alpha-satellite, then beta-satellite/gamma-satellite shore blocks transitioning to the p-arm acrocentric stalk.

architecture.internal_structure: D13Z1 dimeric HOR core (~2-3 Mb) flanked by divergent monomeric alpha-satellite; near-identical D21Z1 on chr21 (SF3 family). Functional CENP-A core occupies a sub-Mb subdomain (Altemose 2022).
